[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000100 3
1 11011100 5
2 10011001 4
3 01100000 2
4 10011111 6
5 01010010 3
6 01100111 5
7 10000110 3

01 10 00000000 a
12 21 10100101 4
23 32 11001101 5
34 43 00110101 4
45 54 11100001 4
56 65 00100101 3
67 76 11111001 6
70 07 01100000 2 match 3

02 20 10100101 4
13 31 01101000 3
24 42 11111000 5
35 53 11010100 4
46 64 11000100 3 match 0

60 06 10011001 4 match 2
71 17 01100000 2 match 3

25 52 00011001 3
36 63 11110001 5

61 16 10011001 4 match 2
72 27 11000101 4

37 73 00001000 1
